title: antenoron filiforme var. neofiliforme
intro: Antenoron filiforme var. neofiliforme, also known as Antenoron, is a plant species belonging to the Apocynaceae family, native to tropical Asia. The plant has been traditionally used in various cultures for its medicinal properties, particularly for its antidiarrheal, anti-inflammatory, and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Antenoron include relief from diarrhea, dysentery, and other gastrointestinal issues, as well as wound healing and skin infections. Antenoron is often used in herbal preparations, such as decoctions and infusions, to treat various health conditions, although more research is needed to confirm its efficacy and potential side effects.
